title: Licensing and Tech Transfer
description: License technologies and software from Sandia National Laboratories’ extensive intellectual property portfolio.
text:
Sandia’s intellectual property results primarily from R&D conducted for the government in the national security sector.
A number of Sandia advancements are suitable for licensing by startups and entrepreneurs.
Several of Sandia’s innovations have been recognized for their technological significance as well as their potential to change industries and make the world a better place.
